productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Brown Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 28 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 11 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with two inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleZipper pocket at the back for additional space                                    Metallic embellishment with brand name on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
